name: 2026 Utah Workers Comp Maximum TTD Benefit in Murray UT

mainEntity.name: What is the exact 2026 maximum weekly temporary total disability benefit for workers comp in Murray Utah?
mainEntity.text: What is the exact 2026 maximum weekly temporary total disability benefit for workers comp in Murray Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: As of 2023, Utah's maximum temporary total disability benefit is $1,230 per week, calculated as two-thirds of the state average weekly wage plus $20 per dependent. This amount is recalculated annually on July 1; check the Utah Labor Commission for the 2026 figure[3][4].

suggestedAnswer.text: Utah adjusts workers' comp maximum temporary disability benefits yearly based on the state average weekly wage. In 2023, it reached $1,230 weekly for total disability. For 2026 claims in Murray or Salt Lake County, verify the current rate via the Utah Labor Commission's Industrial Accidents Division website or Form 100, as outdated info from insurers could reduce your payout. Delays in reporting may impact eligibility[1][3][4].
